presets.title: Zero — Descoberta del moviment
presets.description: Generator-mode preset for people who have never exercised. Extremely conservative, emphasizes learning to move with correct technique rather than training loads. Recommended for the first 4 weeks of any fitness journey.
presets.notes: This block is designed for people with no prior training experience; may help build foundational movement patterns and body awareness. Focus entirely on technique — progression load is secondary.

presets.title: Zero → Fonaments (Setmanes 1–4)
presets.description: Faithful-mode foundational block for people starting from absolute zero. 2 sessions/week of 15–20 minutes, using only the simplest body-weight exercises. Prioritizes learning movement patterns over intensity.
presets.notes: First 4-week block for absolute beginners: each session should feel achievable and confidence-building. Stop if any movement causes pain. Consult a healthcare professional before starting if you have any medical condition.

presets.title: Zero → Progressió (Setmanes 5–10)
presets.description: Faithful-mode second block for people who have completed the first 4-week foundational block. 2–3 sessions/week of 20–25 minutes. Introduces basic compound exercises with very light load. Linear progression.
presets.notes: Second block — continue only after completing 4 weeks of the foundational block. Increase reps or resistance only when all sets feel controlled and pain-free. This block may help consolidate motor learning and introduce progressive overload.

sessions.label: Sessió C opcional — Cos complet + mobilitat

zero_descoberta_v1.name: Zero — Descoberta del moviment
zero_descoberta_v1.description: Preset en mode generador per a persones que mai han fet exercici. Molt conservador, centrat en aprendre a moure's correctament. Recomanat per a les primeres 4 setmanes.

zero_fonaments_setmana01_04_v1.name: Zero → Fonaments (Setmanes 1–4)
zero_fonaments_setmana01_04_v1.description: Bloc fidel per a absolute principiants. 2 sessions/setmana de 15–20 minuts amb exercicis bàsics de pes corporal. Prioritza aprendre patrons de moviment per sobre de la intensitat.

zero_progressio_setmana05_10_v1.name: Zero → Progressió (Setmanes 5–10)
zero_progressio_setmana05_10_v1.description: Segon bloc per a persones que han completat les 4 setmanes inicials. 2–3 sessions/setmana de 20–25 minuts. Introdueix exercicis compostos bàsics amb càrrega molt lleugera.

zero_descoberta_v1.name: Cero — Descubrimiento del movimiento
zero_descoberta_v1.description: Preset en modo generador para personas que nunca han hecho ejercicio. Muy conservador, centrado en aprender a moverse correctamente. Recomendado para las primeras 4 semanas.

zero_fonaments_setmana01_04_v1.name: Cero → Fundamentos (Semanas 1–4)
zero_fonaments_setmana01_04_v1.description: Bloque fiel para principiantes absolutos. 2 sesiones/semana de 15–20 minutos con ejercicios básicos de peso corporal. Prioriza aprender patrones de movimiento sobre la intensidad.

zero_progressio_setmana05_10_v1.name: Cero → Progresión (Semanas 5–10)
zero_progressio_setmana05_10_v1.description: Segundo bloque para personas que han completado las 4 semanas iniciales. 2–3 sesiones/semana de 20–25 minutos. Introduce ejercicios compuestos básicos con carga muy ligera.

zero_descoberta_v1.name: Zero — Movement discovery
zero_descoberta_v1.description: Generator-mode preset for people who have never exercised. Very conservative, focused on learning to move correctly. Recommended for the first 4 weeks.

zero_fonaments_setmana01_04_v1.name: Zero → Foundations (Weeks 1–4)
zero_fonaments_setmana01_04_v1.description: Faithful-mode block for absolute beginners. 2 sessions/week of 15–20 minutes using basic body-weight exercises. Prioritizes learning movement patterns over intensity.

zero_progressio_setmana05_10_v1.name: Zero → Progression (Weeks 5–10)
zero_progressio_setmana05_10_v1.description: Second block for people who have completed the initial 4 weeks. 2–3 sessions/week of 20–25 minutes. Introduces basic compound exercises with very light load.
